login.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your admin account
login.hint: Use this account to access the monitoring system
login.setupNotice: First run detected. Please set up an admin account.

error.network: Cannot reach the server. Check that the backend is running.

login.forgotPasswordDesc: In a self-hosted environment, you can reset your password using the methods below.
login.recoveryMethod1Desc: Set environment variables and restart the server to reset the password.
login.recoveryMethod2Desc: Access the container and delete the account to return to the initial setup screen.
